title: taraxacum acerrinum
intro: Taraxacum acerrinum, also known as the bitter dandelion or common dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum acerrinum include supporting liver function, improving digestion, and reducing blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various forms, such as dried roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
